title: dnsmasq bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:

- Fix dnsmasq caching of intertwined CNAMES
- Resolves: RHEL-61943

[2.79-34]
- Enable retries again (RHEL-6586)
